回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部學士班	113學年度第2學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 西洋繪畫的故事 (The Stories of Western Painting)	開課班級 : 應英二年級	學　　分 : 2.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 吳唯邦	必選修 : 選修	 	 


1.教學目標
This interdisciplinary course will explore the evolution of Western art from its roots in ancient Greece to contemporary expressions. Students will examine key artworks, analyze artistic expressions, and investigate the historical and cultural contexts that shaped their creation. 


2.教學綱要
Identify and analyze major artistic movements and styles throughout Western art history.
Develop critical thinking and analytical skills by interpreting and analyzing visual art.
Understand the historical and cultural contexts that influenced the creation of specific artworks.
Research and discuss the lives and works of significant artists.
Communicate an understanding of art through written assignments, presentations, and class participations. 


3.教科書
1	書名 : Learning without a textbook　
出版日期 : 年 月 
作者 : 　出版社 : 　版本 :  


4.參考書
1	書名 : Learning without a textbook　出版日期 : 年 月

※請遵守智慧財產權觀念，依著作權法規定，教科書及教材不得非法影印與使用盜版軟體。

5.教學進度表
週次	日期	內容	備註
1	
2025/02/16─2025/02/22
	Orientation 	 
2	
2025/02/23─2025/03/01
	Foundations of Western Art (c. 570 BCE - 4th Century CE) 	The Birth of Western Art: Greek Vase Painting 
3	
2025/03/02─2025/03/08
	The Rise of Christian Art (4th - 14th Centuries) 	From Myth to Message: Early Christian Art 
4	
2025/03/09─2025/03/15

2025/03/16─2025/03/22

6	
2025/03/23─2025/03/29

2025/03/30─2025/04/05
	Tomb-Sweeping (Ancestral Commemoration) Week

2025/04/06─2025/04/12

2025/04/13─2025/04/19

2025/04/20─2025/04/26

2025/04/27─2025/05/03

2025/05/18─2025/05/24
	Modernism and the 20th Century (20th Century) 	Symbolism and the Birth of Modern Art

 
15	
2025/05/25─2025/05/31
	Contemporary Art and Global Perspectives (20th and 21st Centuries) 	Activism in Contemporary Art: Exploring Street Art, Graffiti, and Digital Forms

2025/06/01─2025/06/07
	Final Exam

2025/06/08─2025/06/14

18	
2025/06/15─2025/06/21
	End-of-semester individual consultations arranged by appointment 	 


6.成績評定及課堂要求
Presentation 20%; Midterm exam and Finam exam 80% 
Attend class and stay engaged
